notes: synthetic SCM; clean-room; U->T->M->Y with U->Y confounding and no direct T->Y edge (U unmeasured, absent from the graph); M=1*T+noise, Y=2*M+U+noise; two-stage product-of-coefficients recovers effect=1*2=2

generation.env: uv run --python 3.12 --with dowhy==0.14 --with numpy --with pandas --with statsmodels --with scikit-learn python scripts/conformance/generate_dowhy_estimate_oracles.py

reference.command: uv run --python 3.12 --with dowhy==0.14 --with numpy --with pandas --with statsmodels --with scikit-learn python scripts/conformance/generate_dowhy_estimate_oracles.py
reference.note: black-box execution only; no source translation

 ⎡ d       d       ⎤
E⎢────(y)⋅────([m])⎥
 ⎣d[m]    d[t]     ⎦
Estimand assumption 1, Full-mediation: m intercepts (blocks) all directed paths from t to y.
Estimand assumption 2, First-stage-unconfoundedness: If U→{t} and U→{m} then P(m|t,U) = P(m|t)
Estiman
